---
title: "Genetics Project Progress"
author: "Group Members: Natalie Karten, Lorna Darling, and Brianna Arledge"
format: html
---

## Project Goals
Our project aims to...

## Resources Consulted
- Article:
- Website:
- Textbook:

## Progress So Far
We have:
- Researched...
- Collected data on...
- Began analysis...

## Initial Code/Data
```{python}
# Example code
print("Hello project")
